content: no offense but i genuinely hope they do because current caraboo anatomy looks so weird
They can give us a toggle option idk

And GMurphy genuinely looks better, the anatomy and detail is better & more inline with the overall artstyle; the eye color is a choice thing, i get some people preferring white eye, but the art is without doubt better
if you really think that then they should have updated every old units
Not every old unit have bad anatomy though

awakeners are not humans anymore 
I don’t see why they must have accurate anatomy
Please don’t get defensive, we can agree to disagree
Arachne is another thing; I hope they tone back and keep the original facial features more

and Caraboo artist should be Liz artist
her art is one of the few unique styles in the game
I prefer they keep it like it is
However Arachne update also had better details
yeah sure better details
Like technique and delivery/finishedness is objective
Art direction is subjective
isn’t this just spit on the original artist face
Light said he and BIAV respect old artist works and won’t change them
and they do just that
I’m here talking about what I think is good art as a player and you straight up get super defensive and start accusing people of disrespect 😭
Chill girl
I don’t care how GTulu or any future units will look but Arachne and Caraboo should remain the same
that was for BIAV
not for you
I guess this is a big fat lie

Yeah like I’m not biav and I won’t be dictating what they do; even if I appreciate and hope for art updates on Awakener arts *I think*  are subpar/doesnt match the rest of the characters well, it won’t happen, because I’m just another player
truly respect for the artist
Also i agree arachnes update is meh and they should tone it back
Also reminder that no single art is done by ONE artist and it’s always group effort
I can’t really take their words seriously when they always contradict eachother
So I don’t think it’s that different. The other characters are designed by one then drawn by others too

on one hand they said they won’t modify things bc they respect old art
but now they do it anw and don’t actually give out explaination
They can also polish WITH respects to the original design and style, which the current Arachne update isn’t doing well.
Didn’t they say theyll re-redo the arachne art after people complained though
and you don’t see me talk about that when it’s clearly the more unique ones like Arachne and Caraboo all have their own artstyle signature

I don’t believe them
They can prevent this from happening in the first place if they keep Arachne art as she is
Uh i lowkey don’t understand this sentence, “i don’t see you talk about arachne”?
Yeah ok

you misunderstood me
what I mean is I don’t talk about other units and only about Arachne and Caraboo

Still I do think Caraboos art is a bit lesser than Liz in terms of TECHNIQUE and EXECUTION but that’s my subjective opinion; I’ll pull if they keep it as is, and I’ll be even happier if they update it & keep the design.
they all have distinct and unique styles and I would like them to keep it
And i also hope they give us a toggle option so everyone can choose which version they want
When it comes to like arachne
And I also don’t really like vortice outfit
Even something like Pickman and GMurphy art discussions can be prevented if BIAV even thought of a simple feature like that in the first place
Maybe a skin one day
I think there is a disconnection between BIAV and their players
So like at the end of the day, Im not saying “i know you like the original art, and I hope they take it away from you”
it’s clear that newer players have different views about the art than older players
I understand and hope biav lets people have the original art theyve always liked. Me preferring art updates doesnt mean I want to prevent people from having the old art
they used the new style for GMurphy Mouchette Xu Vortice so I can see why some people thought Arachne change is fine

yeah I understand it
I just don’t agree with art change is an upgrade in this case and BIAV just contradicted their words
it’s just a big pile of BIAV contradictions
Liz and Caraboo look odd to me, too. But I’m a newer player, so I don’t have much attachment to the older artists.
It’s sad to see unique artstyle that still fit with the game and already part of the game since launch is now odd

Ah and I guess it’s also a perspective mismatch thing. Because they were gonna EOS, they said in the interview, they just “grabbed the most finished character arts at the time” and made a PV. Then TO THEM, they may think “some of these arts here are still WIP and we gotta finish them.”

Also more importantly TO THEM, character art has always been a group effort, no one character is done by a single person; almost every Morimens artist, when posting on XHS, said “I participated in…/I helped finalizing…” instead of “I did this entire thing alone”
That is your speculation
It’s very true that the Arachne update fumbled and was missing a lot of the charming aspects in the old art. They failed to polish IN RESPECT, doesn’t mean they don’t wanna
if GDoll is really an unfinished product than why we don’t see any GDoll art change now?
Why Doresain is still the same?
But i can provide proof of what the artists said word for word?
then I will eat my word and say they really released unfinished products with GDoll and Doreaain
also you don’t need to prove that
one of the first things I done when I first joined was looking at the art thread
there are multiple artists for a lot of process
so I understand that process
but you can still see specific artist signature in the unit designs
They wrote 细化 FINALIZE and if it was done by one person they wouldnt say that
we will get more Xu Mouchette Vortice style in the future anw
Salvador has eyes?!
a few remnants of old styles don’t need to be changed
Ofc probably not every art follows the same process and some have more personal style than the rest, but im not basing my claims on pure speculation lol
it’s not like I can see the old styles in future units anw
what I think about speculation here is they grabbing unfinished products for the pv
that is the part
The Pickman “new art” is from 2022
I don’t believe all the units in the pv are unfinished
atleast in the art part
